'''danodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oillet|oillet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oillet|oillet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| danodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dænedheth|dænedheth]] || [[word:dænedhej|dænedhej]] || [[word:dænedhesh|dænedhesh]] || [[word:dænedhe|dænedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:danonodhoth|danonodhoth]] || [[word:danonodhoj|danonodhoj]] || [[word:danonodhosh|danonodhosh]] || [[word:danonodho|danonodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:danodhoth|danodhoth]] || [[word:danodhoj|danodhoj]] || [[word:danodhosh|danodhosh]] || [[word:danodho|danodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:danofdhoth|danofdhoth]] || [[word:danofdhoj|danofdhoj]] || [[word:danofdhosh|danofdhosh]] || [[word:danofdhof|danofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danodhotho|danodhotho]] || [[word:danodhojo|danodhojo]] || [[word:danodhosho|danodhosho]] || [[word:danodhoko|danodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danodhoth|danodhoth]] || [[word:danodhoj|danodhoj]] || [[word:danodhosh|danodhosh]] || [[word:danodho|danodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danodhothol|danodhothol]] || [[word:danodhojol|danodhojol]] || [[word:danodhoshol|danodhoshol]] || [[word:danodhokol|danodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danodhothotho|danodhothotho]] || [[word:danodhojojo|danodhojojo]] || [[word:danodhoshosho|danodhoshosho]] || [[word:danodhoko|danodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danodhothon|danodhothon]] || [[word:danodhojon|danodhojon]] || [[word:danodhoshon|danodhoshon]] || [[word:danodhokon|danodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danodhothoro|danodhothoro]] || [[word:danodhojoro|danodhojoro]] || [[word:danodhoshoro|danodhoshoro]] || [[word:danodhokoro|danodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
